form.formComment: Comes here second-up after a week-and-a-half. Lacklustre first-up performance when was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr4) over 2180m at Stawell, beaten 20 m by Magellan (2:44.00) in MAIDEN on April 3 at $81. Hard to make a case in this field.

form.formComment: In good form recently. Last start won by 1.0 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr4) at Mt Gambier (2:46.60) beating Grinning Reactor in NR up to 44 on April 7 at $3 at the bell was leading 2.4. Going well and is expected to measure up again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung out whilst under pressure over the concluding stages.
Shifted out under pressure in the final straight.

form.formComment: Won three starts back at Terang over 2180m 0-1 WIN on March 2. Last time out 8th (Fr6) over 1680m at Terang, beaten 18 m by Admiralofthefleet (2:02.50) in NR up to 47 on March 27 at $71. Rates well on best form and worth including.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 3.5 m fifth behind Optimal at Stawell over 1785m 4yo+ NR up to 49 last start. Before that was beaten 4.5 metres third again at Stawell same class on April 3. Winning prospects.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, broke in score up and was out of position at the start surrendered the lead and finished 7th (Fr2) over 1780m after showing early speed at Mt Gambier, beaten 50 m by Dancin With Elvis (2:12.60) in NR up to 39 on April 7 at $31. Before that 8th (Fr1) over 1785m after showing early pace at Stawell, beaten 60 m by Loan Sailor (2:11.30) in NR up to 40 on April 3 at $8.50. Form not inspiring.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced to tire leaving the 400m mark to be beaten 60.0m.
Gave ground over the concluding stages to be beaten 50m into 10th place.
Over raced in the early and middle stages of the race.
Tired over the concluding stages to eventually be beaten 65.0m.
Broke gait in the score-up, out of position when the start was initiated.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 8th (Fr4) over 1785m at Stawell, at the bell was 9th-13.3 beaten 12 m by Roblen Ranger (2:10.30) in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on April 3 at $81. Before that was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr7) over 2195m at Ararat beaten 30 m by Line Up Jacquie (2:45.10) in NR 39 to 45 on March 23 at $31. Hard to have.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced three wide with cover from the 800m mark.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 6 m finishing fourth after being driven well back, behind Line Up Jacquie at Ararat over 2195m in a NR 39 to 45 on March 23 at $81. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4 m finishing third behind Lester at Stawell over 2180m in a NR 40 to 45 on April 3 at $7.50. Very hard to beat.

formComments.comment: Two back was beaten by 6 m finishing fourth after being driven well back, behind Line Up Jacquie at Ararat over 2195m in a NR 39 to 45 on March 23 at $81. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4 m finishing third behind Lester at Stawell over 2180m in a NR 40 to 45 on April 3 at $7.50. Very hard to beat.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 7th (Fr1) over 2190m at Mt Gambier beaten 23 m by Famous Label (2:46.60) in NR up to 44 on April 7 at $3. Showed ability the outing before when she won by a nose after showing early speed, (Fr6) at Ararat (2:12.70) beating Bubble Over in MAIDEN on March 23 at $23 at the bell was leading 3.8. Better than the last run and can improve sharply.

form.formComment: Last start broke in score up and was out of position at the start 7th (Sr1) over 1785m at Stawell beaten 21 m by Rocknroll Willow (2:11.40) in 0-2 WINs on April 3 at $51. Before that, broke in score up and was out of position at the start hung in on scoring up, 6th (Fr6) over 2180m after being wide early at Terang beaten 35 m by Backbeach Peter (2:40.90) in NR up to 50 on March 27 at $81. Big chance to atone.
